decisions.title: Halt business-hours deploys until staging mirrors prod schema
decisions.rationale: prevent a repeat of yesterday's schema-migration outage
decisions.source_quote: no more deploys during business hours until we have a staging environment that mirrors prod schema

action_items.title: Draft ADR on migration discipline
action_items.source_quote: please draft the ADR by next Friday

action_items.title: Loosen the health check and add caching
action_items.source_quote: loosen the health check and ship it this week

action_items.title: Add business-hours deploy ban to the runbook
action_items.source_quote: I'll put it in writing in the runbook

summary.tldr: Team debriefed a 14-minute outage caused by a schema migration that locked the users table and killed health checks. Avery halted business-hours deploys until staging mirrors prod; Rahul owns a migration ADR and Marta will loosen the health check this week. PagerDuty CTO-escalation decision was deferred.
highlights: Defer PagerDuty CTO escalation to next SRE sync
